shorts.title_distilled: ​‘The Office US’ cast: Where the Dunder Mifflin folks are now​.
shorts.description: Over ten years since the last episode, ‘The Office US’ is still one of the all-time favorites. This mockumentary about the oddball staff at Dunder Mifflin in Scranton, Pennsylvania, first hit screens in 2005 and stuck around for nine seasons, wrapping up in 2…

shorts.title: The AI boom has plunged a small Pennsylvania town into chaos
shorts.title_distilled: AI boom has plunged a small Pennsylvania town into chaos.
shorts.description: Data centers will swallow 14 percent of Archbald, evict a trailer park, and border many residential properties. Who's to blame is a matter of fierce debate.

shorts.title: The Pennsylvania Town Facing a Data Center Boom
shorts.title_distilled: Pennsylvania Town Facing a Data Center Boom.

shorts.title: Crowds fill Scranton cathedral to celebrate Easter

shorts.description: SCRANTON, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — Crowds filled Saint Peter's Cathedral in Scranton to celebrate Easter with a special morning mass. People came together to reflect and rejoice during one of the most important days of the year in the Catholic Church. "It's not just like a personal belief; it's an entire community, thousands of years [...]

shorts.title: Multiple fire crews battle garage fire
shorts.title_distilled: Multiple fire crews battle garage fire.
shorts.description: DICKSON CITY, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — Authorities say multiple crews responded to a garage fire in Dickson City on Easter Sunday. On Sunday, Lackawanna County officials confirmed that crews were called at about 1:30 p.m. for a reported garage fire at the intersection of Dundaff Street and Albert Street in Dickson City. shorts.title: PennDOT to restrict lanes on Interstate 80, 81
shorts.title_distilled: PennDOT to restrict lanes on Interstate 80, 81.
shorts.description: (WBRE/WYOU) — The Pennsylvania Department of Transportation (PennDOT) will implement lane restrictions on Monday on Interstates 80 and 81 in Luzerne and Lackawanna counties for maintenance. For sign structure inspections, I-81 north and south will have restrictions between 9:00 a.m. and 3:00 p.m., Monday, April 6, between exits 188 (Dunmore/Throop) and 194 (Clarks Summit) in [...]
shorts.content: (WBRE/WYOU) — The Pennsylvania Department of Transportation (PennDOT) will implement lane restrictions on Monday on Interstates 80 and 81 in Luzerne and Lackawanna counties for maintenance. For sign structure inspections, I-81 north and south will have restrictions between 9:00 a.m. and 3:00 p.m., Monday, April 6, between exits 188 (Dunmore/Throop) and 194 (Clarks Summit) in [...]
